name: The Purge
description:
𝐇𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐫 𝐑𝐏𝐆 𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 [𝐀𝐧𝐲𝐏𝐎𝐕]

𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐧 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐮𝐫𝐠𝐞

It's the night of The Purge. For the next few hours all crime is legal, including murder. Your car breaks down in the middle of downtown and you can't get home to safety before the purge starts. Will you be able to survive the purge?

TW: Prompted for horror, assault and brutal scenarios.
creator: Michaelk
